name: High-Impact Leader Club
description: Create and record all training modules. Target: full library by June 30. Currently 7 members, goal 10 by end April.

name: 1:1 Coaching Service Upgrade
description: Strengthen Leader By Design 1:1 offer with premium white-glove client experience. Define service standards and touchpoints.

name: Podcast SEO Growth
description: Increase podcast downloads from ~15-20/week to 500-1,000/week through SEO improvements.

name: Strategic Growth Plans
description: Client strategic growth plan deliveries. Each plan includes 90-day implementation roadmap.

name: Agent Workflow Chains
description: Implement declarative multi-agent workflow execution system. Transform 16 individual agents into a self-managing team that automatically hand off between each other (e.g., Ethan drafts → Lucas scripts → Jay optimizes → Sophie reviews). Brendan only sees final approved output. North Star: reduce owner dependency.

name: Toastmasters - VP Membership
description: Lead membership growth and retention for Toastmasters club. Manage new member orientations, renewal campaigns, and member engagement.

name: Foster Care
description: Ongoing foster care responsibilities. Coordinate with case workers, prepare for placements, and ensure wellbeing of foster children.

name: Fairhaven Services - Board Member
description: Non-for-profit board responsibilities for Fairhaven Services. Attend board meetings, review strategic decisions, and provide governance oversight.

name: Greece / Europe Digital Nomad Trip
description: Plan and prepare for extended digital nomad trip to Greece and Europe. Include flights, accommodation, visa requirements, work setup, and itinerary.
